# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.io/v3
kind: EnvoyConfig
type: clusters
name: my-cluster
transport_socket:
  name: tls
  typed_config:
    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.TransportSocket
    common_tls_context:
      name: my-tls-context
ext_transport_filters:
  filters:
  - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3beta1.HttpConnectionManager
      route_configuration:
        name: my-route-config
          virtual_hosts:
          - domains: ["*"]
            routes:
            - match:
                uri: "/(.*)"
              route:
                cluster: my-cluster
                timeout:
                  initial: 0.25s
                  max: 1s
                  grace_period: 0.25s
        retry_policy:
          total: 5
          interval: 50ms
          per_try_max: 3
